title: ICRISAT's strategic plan for technical cooperation: report of the Working Group on Technical Cooperation (Technical assistance)
abstract: A priority agenda for ICRISAT is to cooperate with National Agricultural Research Systems (NARS) to foster, facilitate and conduct research on mandate crops, agricultural resources, technologies and institutions towards assuring a better livelihood for the rural peoples of the semi-arid tropics, and a sustained development of their technical cooperation is to promote research and the development of available manpower in NARS so that improved technologies get adopted expeditiously...
